india_trends.title: SpaceX accelerates IPO timeline, targets June 11 pricing on Nasdaq
india_trends.summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is accelerating its IPO plans, with pricing expected around June 11 and a potential market debut by June 12 on Nasdaq. The company has fast-tracked filings after a quicker SEC review, moving ahead of its earlier late June timeline as it eyes strong investor demand.

india_trends.title: Sherritt to Dissolve Cuba Mining Venture Due to US Sanctions
india_trends.summary: Sherritt International Corp., a Canadian company that has invested in Cuba for decades, said it will seek to dissolve its nickel mining joint venture on the island due to US sanctions.

india_trends.title: Govt imposes export duty on petrol, cuts levy on diesel, jet fuel exports
india_trends.summary: The export levies were originally introduced on 27 March in a bid to ensure domestic availability of petroleum products by disincentivizing exports in the backdrop of the West Asia crisis.

india_trends.title: Russian crude supplies to India have increased, claims Sergey Lavrov
india_trends.summary: Russia has increased oil supplies to India, according to Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov. This comes as a crucial US waiver for purchasing Russian crude is set to expire. india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold plunges $171/oz; silver down $9.1 on inflation worries, firm US dollar
india_trends.summary: On May 15, precious metals fell as a stronger US dollar and rising inflation dampened rate cut expectations. Gold hit a two-week low and silver dropped sharply, with both metals facing heavy weekly losses amid increased energy prices and high Treasury yields.

india_trends.title: Govt imposes ₹3/litre windfall tax on petrol exports; cuts diesel, ATF levies
india_trends.summary: The government has introduced a windfall gains tax of Rs 3 per litre on petrol exports. Levies on diesel exports are now Rs 16.5 per litre, and on aviation turbine fuel, they are Rs 16 per litre. These changes are effective from May 16.

india_trends.title: Hindustan Zinc to roll out AI-driven solutions across mining, manufacturing operations
india_trends.summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited is set to generate two thousand crore rupees in value. This will be achieved by implementing artificial intelligence solutions across its mining and manufacturing operations. india_trends.title: Tata Steel ended FY26 on a strong note, aided by higher volumes and firm steel prices
india_trends.summary: Tata Steel closed FY26 with a 6% revenue rise to ₹2.32 trillion and a threefold jump in net profit, driven by strong volumes and firm steel prices.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: JSW Steel posts 13-fold rise in profit for March quarter; to double capacity in 6 years
india_trends.summary: JSW Steel reported a nearly 13-fold surge in Q4 profit driven by an exceptional gain and record volumes. The company plans aggressive expansion, targeting 78 million tonne capacity by FY32, supported by JVs, higher capex and strong domestic steel demand growth outlook.

india_trends.title: SAIL Q4 Results: Cons PAT surges 47% YoY to Rs 1,835 crore, revenue rises 5%
india_trends.summary: SAIL reported a strong Q4FY26 performance with net profit rising 47% year on year and revenue growing 5%. Sequential profit surged sharply, EBITDA improved significantly, and the board recommended a dividend of Rs 2.35 per share despite mixed global steel production trends and output softness.

india_trends.summary: Retail inflation is set to rise by 0.42 percent due to increased fuel and milk prices. Economists predict broader impacts on transportation, logistics, and food costs.
